home.homeDesc: Learn to read, pronounce, and write Hiragana and Katakana interactively. 100% Client-Side, free, secure, and ad-free.
home.nicknameHelp: Nickname is used to validate the ownership of progress backup files.
home.backupDesc: Save or restore your Hiragana & Katakana learning progress locally via text files.
home.exportDesc: Export your active study data to a .txt file
home.importDragDrop: Drag & drop backup .txt file here, or click to upload
home.resourcesDesc: Utilize free visual guides from Tofugu to learn basic Japanese pronunciation and stroke orders.
home.tofuguHiraganaDesc: Learn how to read, write, and memorize Hiragana from scratch.
home.tofuguKatakanaDesc: An interactive workbook to master reading and writing Katakana.

toast.importSuccess: Welcome back, {name}! Progress data successfully imported.
toast.importErrorMismatch: Import failed: Nickname does not match your active nickname.
toast.importErrorInvalid: Import failed: Damaged file or invalid TM-KANA progress backup format.

chart.title: Interactive Kana Chart
chart.desc: Browse Hiragana and Katakana characters, check your learning progress, and practice writing stroke orders.
chart.detailDesc: Stroke order guide and writing practice pad.
chart.offlineStrokeOrder: Stroke order guide image failed to load. You can practice directly using the guidance lines below!

practice.title: Practice Arena
practice.desc: Sharpen your Hiragana and Katakana skills with Quiz or Drawing Mode.
practice.selectCharsDesc: Click characters to toggle them in or out of the practice session.
practice.noGroupsSelectedForChars: Please select at least one character group on the left to view character details.
practice.noGroupsSelected: Please select at least one character group to start.
practice.typeHelp: Type the Romaji and press Enter
practice.drawHelp: Trace the character outline below and click Check
practice.incorrectFeedback: So close! Try again — the answer is {romaji}
practice.finishDesc: Here is the summary of your practice session.
practice.strokeWarningPosition: Stroke {num}: try drawing it in the right position!
practice.strokeWarningDirection: Stroke {num}: you drew it backwards — start from the other end!
practice.strokeWarningCurvatureLess: Stroke {num}: needs a bit more curve — don't make it too straight!
practice.strokeWarningCurvatureMore: Stroke {num}: too curved — try to make it straighter!
practice.strokeWarningShape: Stroke {num}: the shape isn't quite right — check the guide outline!
practice.strokeWarningGeneral: Stroke {num} isn't right yet — follow the guide and try again!

progressPage.title: Learning Progress Dashboard
progressPage.desc: Track your Hiragana & Katakana reading, pronunciation, and writing progress in detail.
progressPage.dangerZoneDesc: Permanently deletes all of your learning history, accuracy statistics, mastery status, and nickname from this device.
progressPage.resetConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete all of your learning progress? This action cannot be undone.
progressPage.resetToastSuccess: All learning progress has been successfully reset.
